mapper.select: SELECT id, title, summary, cover_image, source, view_count, publish_time, create_time FROM news WHERE is_visible = 1 ORDER BY publish_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, title, summary, content, cover_image, source, view_count, publish_time, create_time FROM news WHERE id = #{id} AND is_visible = 1

SELECT id, title, summary, cover_image, source, view_count, is_visible, publish_time, create_time FROM news
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY publish_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news (category_name, title, summary, content, cover_image, source, view_count, is_visible, publish_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{categoryName}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{source}, #{viewCount}, #{isVisible}, #{publishTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE news SET is_visible = #{isVisible} WHERE id = #{id}
